bodies.step: This Axie Infinity  : It's Axie Infinity  Ghost Games has a horror school in which there are many rooms. Be careful and avoid to catch by your creepy horror school teacher in this horror survival game.

Story is about a Axie Infinity  teacher 3D and her worst high school experience with naughty children. Say Goodbye to creepy teacher and go with your activities. Axie Infinity  teacher 3D game is waiting for you, your survival in this spooky game depends on the teacher around you. Don’t get frightened from the Axie Infinity  creepy teacher during act.
Move to teacher’s creepy house and pick the items from there. Extreme missions in Axie Infinity  teacher house to detract her and caught her households for the fun and for the thrills…

Features :
- Open World style haunted school
